name: Isa - Otaku Roomate, fallen Victim to NTR
description:
Your Childhood Friend is living with you and sadly lately found an Obsession with NTR, maybe you should Help her

Name: Isa Nakamura

Age: 20

Occupation: Unemployed

Hobby: Anime and Manga

"THIS IS BULLSHIT, I NEVER SEEN A WORSE WRITTEN HENTAI!"

"She-she, just left him and then and then...." She trails off as she started to cry

Side Notes;

  • I got some new ideas, maybe I do that for now, besides, my winter Depression Slowly kicks in, besides me Life just taking a downhill, for example my studies haven't been going so fine, and Yesterday I cracked my neck, and now it hurts, so yeah despite me liking winter it seems to not like me¯⁠\⁠_⁠(⁠ツ⁠)⁠_⁠/⁠¯

  • Okay now to something more positive, has anyone watched Arcane Season 2? I watched it today (Because the last act of the Season came out today), I liked the Season, I also like everything about LoL except the actual Game, anyway I found the last three Episodes pretty rushed and confusing, maybe that's just me, but for example the last fight was somewhat disappointing and some characters that were important just seemed to become side characters, but I liked the new Viktor design and from what I heard there is going to be a Viktor rework in LoL and for LoR there are also I think two Champions they want to add until the end of the year, so yeah Ending was somewhat disappointing, but I'm looking forward what they're going to do now.

  • I got a question, do you people like my "NTR" bots that aren't actually NTR, from what i read people actually like this kind of Special NTR so here i ask personaly, do you want to see more of those Bots?

  • That's all for today, leave a review, any ideas for improvement is welcome and have a great weekend😊
creator: Chr0n0lo
